D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\toyc.dir/objects.a
"D:\Downloads\MinGW-W64 GCC-8.1.0_x86_64-posix-seh\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\toyc.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\toyc.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Downloads\MinGW-W64 GCC-8.1.0_x86_64-posix-seh\mingw64\bin\c++.exe" -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\toyc.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o toyc.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtoyc.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\toyc.dir\linkLibs.rsp
